name: Lemonade Wafers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine shortening and sugar in a medium bowl. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
3. Add lemon peel and juice. Blend well.
4. In another bowl, combine flour, salt, and baking powder.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the lemon mixture at low speed until just blended.
6. Drop dough by level tablespoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Sprinkle with coconut if desired.
8. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until cookies are set and edges are golden brown. Watch closely so that the coconut does not burn.
9. Cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring to a cooling rack.
10. Allow to cool completely.
